messages.content: صحح If you are still unable to download the file, please try to use any browser other than ‘Safari’.
If you are still unable to download the file, please try using a different browser other than 'Safari'.
صحح Your download should start automatically in 1 seconds. If it doesn't please click here. Do not refresh this page.
Your download should start automatically in 1 second. If it doesn't, please click here. Do not refresh this page.

صحح 
THE FILE HAS BEEN DOWNLOADED
The file has been downloaded.
صحح Browse all SVGs
Browse all SVG files.

صحح Do I get access to all files?

Yes, once you sign up, you can immediately start downloading any design you want according to the plan you have subscribed to.
Can I cancel at any time?

Yes, although our subscriptions do automatically renew, you are free to cancel at any time. After that, your subscription will automatically stop and no further charges will occur.

Do I have access to all files?
Yes, once you sign up, you will have immediate access to download any design you want, based on the plan you have subscribed to.

Can I cancel anytime?
Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. Please note that our subscriptions do automatically renew, but you are free to cancel before the next renewal. Once cancelled, your subscription will stop, and no further charges will occur.

صحح How can I cancel my subscription?

To do this, you will need to do 4 steps.
1- Login to your account.
2- At the top right of the menu bar, click “Upgrade your plan”
3- On the Actions tab Click “Abandon”
4- Click the “Abandon Subscription” button.

To cancel your subscription, please follow these steps:

1. Login to your account.
2. At the top right of the menu bar, click on "Upgrade your plan".
3. On the Actions tab, click on "Abandon".
4. Finally, click the "Abandon Subscription" button.

By following these steps, you will be able to cancel your subscription successfully.
صحح Please watch this video before registering.
Please watch this video before registering.

صحح What happens when I end my subscription?

Once you end your subscription, Your paid plan will switch to the free plan and you will have access to download one "SVG" file per day.
Once you end your subscription, your paid plan will switch to the free plan. With the free plan, you will have access to download one "SVG" file per day.
صحح What happens when I end my subscription?

When you end your subscription, you will no longer have access to the premium features and benefits associated with your subscription plan. You will be switched to a free plan, which may have limitations on file downloads, access to certain content, or other restrictions compared to the paid plan you had. It is important to review the details of the free plan to understand what changes will occur after canceling your subscription.
صحح What happens when I end my subscription

When you end your subscription, you will no longer have access to the premium features and benefits provided by the subscription plan. This means you may lose access to exclusive content, unlimited downloads, customer support, and other perks associated with your subscription. It's important to note that any downloaded files or work created during your subscription will remain accessible to you. However, once your subscription expires, you won't be able to access new premium content or features until you resubscribe or upgrade your plan.
هل ترجمة هذه الجمله صحيح "What happens when I end my subscription?"
نعم، الترجمة الصحيحة للجملة "What happens when I end my subscription?" هي: "ماذا يحدث عندما أنهي اشتراكي؟"

صح الجمل التالية "I can still only download one design even though I paid for the subscription, how do I fix it?
My account status is pending, how can I fix it?

This means that the payment is still pending from your side, make sure to follow these steps as shown in this video."

Yes, the provided sentences are correct.

"I can still only download one design even though I paid for the subscription, how do I fix it?"

"My account status is pending, how can I fix it?"

Additionally, please note that the last part of the sentence is incomplete.
صحح This means that the payment is still pending from your side, make sure to follow these steps as shown in this video.”
This means that the payment is still pending from your side. Please make sure to follow the steps shown in this video to resolve the issue.

صحح My plan has expired, how do I update my plan?
How can I increase the daily download limit?

You have to upgrade your plan first to increase your daily download limit.

To upgrade your plan, you must “cancel” the current plan and then upgrade to the plan you want as shown in this video

My plan has expired, how do I renew or update my plan?

To renew or update your plan, you need to follow these steps:

1. Log in to your account.
2. Go to the subscription page or plan options.
3. Select the plan you want to upgrade to.
4. Follow the prompts to complete the payment process.

How can I increase the daily download limit?

To increase your daily download limit, you need to upgrade your plan. By upgrading to a higher-tier plan, you'll unlock a higher daily download limit based on the specific plan you choose. To do this, follow the steps mentioned above to upgrade your plan.

صحح الجمل الأتيه "My plan has expired, how do I update my plan?
How can I increase the daily download limit?

You have to upgrade your plan first to increase your daily download limit.

To upgrade your plan, you must “cancel” the current plan and then upgrade to the plan you want as shown in this video"

"My plan has expired, how do I renew or update my plan?
How can I increase the daily download limit?

To update your plan or increase the daily download limit, you will need to upgrade your current plan.

To upgrade your plan, you must first cancel your current plan. After cancellation, you can then upgrade to the plan that fits your requirements. For a step-by-step guide, please refer to the video provided."
صحح How to cancel your subscription

To cancel your subscription, please follow these steps:

1. Log in to your account.
2. Navigate to your account settings or subscription management.
3. Look for the option to cancel or end your subscription.
4. Follow the prompts or instructions provided to complete the cancellation process.

Note: The specific steps may vary depending on the platform or service you are using. It's recommended to refer to the support documentation or contact customer service for detailed instructions on how to cancel your subscription.
صحح "How to cancel your subscription"

To cancel your subscription, follow these steps:

1. Log in to your account.
2. Go to the subscription settings or account settings section.
3. Locate the option to cancel or end your subscription.
4. Follow the prompts or instructions provided to complete the cancellation process.

Please note that the exact steps may vary depending on the platform or service you are using. For detailed instructions on canceling your subscription, refer to the support documentation or contact customer support.
صحح الجمله التالية "How to cancel your subscription"
"How to cancel your subscription" is already a correct sentence.
صحح الجمله التالية "ACCESS TO DOWNLOAD 100 DESIGNS/MONTH"
Access to download 100 designs per month.
